message:
🐛 Fix namespace selector in Logs & Events using correct API path (#10846)

The frontend was calling /api/namespaces but the backend registers the
route at /api/mcp/namespaces (routes_mcp.go:79). This caused a 404,
leaving the namespace selector empty and preventing pod/log viewing.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
